creative_premise: A hand-drawn domestic room accepts the visitor's chosen direction as gravity and makes its objects, motion, and optional sound obey.

verification.method: isolated source-contract execution before commit using byte-identical artwork source
verification.runtime_claim: source contract passed; browser rendering and public hosting are not yet proven

mobile_contract.controls: native buttons at least 48px plus pointer swipe

falsification_route: Run node contract-check.mjs, host the directory as static files, test all five gravity states on a narrow mobile viewport, verify keyboard operation and reduced motion, and inspect window.__INDEPENDENT_CREATIVE_EVIDENCE__.
